home.ad2: Limited Time Offer, Don't Miss Out

splash.slogan: The leading smart rental warehouse in universities

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.loadFailedMessage: Failed to fetch bookings. Pull down to refresh.
bookings.cancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel the booking for「{{asset}}」?
bookings.noBookingsMessage: You haven't borrowed anything yet. Go check out the homepage!

profile.loadFailed: Profile load failed, please try again later
profile.settingNotReady: Settings feature is under development, stay tuned
profile.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?

scan.title: Scan Device
scan.prompt: Align QR code within frame to scan
scan.notTimeToPickUpMsg: Your booking for「{{asset}}」starts on {{date}}. Please scan again on or after that day.
scan.confirmPickUpMsg:
An approved booking application for「{{asset}}」was detected.

After confirming, the status will change to「Active」and the borrowing period will start ticking.
scan.pickUpSuccessMsg:
Device「{{asset}}」has been successfully activated!
Please return it by {{date}}.
scan.pendingBookingMsg:
Your booking for「{{asset}}」is waiting for admin approval.

You can pick it up by scanning after it's approved.
scan.deviceNotFoundMsg: Cannot find device with serial number「{{id}}」, please check if the ID is correct.
scan.unrecognizedQrCode: Cannot recognize QR code, or device does not exist
scan.cameraRestrictedMsg:
Since you declined or haven't enabled camera access, the scanner is unavailable.
Please manually enter the device ID below to continue.
scan.scanDifficultyMsg: If you have trouble scanning, please enter the device ID here to query.

review.systemBusy: System busy, please try again later

errors.network: Network is wandering, please try again later
errors.authFailed: Invalid email or password, please check and try again

assetDetail.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

notifications.emptyMessage: Booking approvals and return reminders will appear here

booking_approved.title: Booking Approved
booking_approved.message: Your booking application has been approved. You can now pick up the asset.

booking_rejected.title: Booking Rejected
booking_rejected.message: Your booking application has been rejected.

overdue_alert.title: Overdue Warning
overdue_alert.message: Your booking has exceeded the return date. Please return the asset immediately to avoid credit deduction.

return_reminder.title: Return Reminder
return_reminder.message: Your booking is about to expire, please return it on time.

damage_reported.title: Damage Reported
damage_reported.message: A damage report for your booking has been filed.

review_reply.title: Review Reply
review_reply.message: You have received a reply to your review.

system.title: System Notification
system.message: Your asset has been returned. Credit score +5.
